name: EuclidOS
tagline: Unofficial EuclidOS 3.1 Helios for pacman, now discontinued because the source went dead after the initial release.
maintenanceNote: Current focus: archived release reference only; development stopped because the source is dead
highlights: Marks the initial EuclidOS 3.1 Helios release for the Nothing Phone 2a.
This ROM has been discontinued because the source went dead.
Ships with GApps included while leaving Fenrir out of the package by default.
Includes the fingerprint flashbang fix and passes basic integrity out of the box.
changelog: Project is now discontinued because the source is dead.
Includes the fingerprint flashbang fix, with thanks noted to FanDeMaraiste92.
Provides basic integrity out of the box.
Some banking apps may still need extra work and may not function immediately.
A clean flash is recommended for this build.
